summary: Completed comprehensive testing of citation lookup application. Backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend pages load correctly with proper branding removal. Key issue identified: user session management not maintaining login state properly.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions not maintained properly - users redirected to login after profile completion
Date of birth picker in profile form has interaction issues - calendar day selection timing out

integration_issues.flow: Complete user registration to citation search flow
integration_issues.issue: User session lost between profile completion and search page navigation

passed_tests: Admin can view submissions with SSN data
Profile form fields accept input correctly
Payment Methods page loads with card and Federal Kiosk options
Federal Kiosk page shows generic branding (no ByteFederal)
Courses of Action page displays Criminal and Civil options
No Emergent branding visible on any page
Proper authentication redirects for protected pages
Citation search API returns expected results for test citation 87911938c
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix user session management issue - users are being redirected to login page after completing profile instead of proceeding to search page. This breaks the complete user flow from registration to citation search.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (most functionality works, session management issue prevents complete flow)
